Leader.Name: Muad'Dib
Leader.LeaderAbility: Unpredictable Foe: Reveal Turn: If you have one or more sandworms in the Conflict: +1 Intrigue

Leader.Name: Gurney Halleck
Leader.LeaderAbility: Always Smiling: If you have 6 or more strength in the Conflict (10 in a six-player game): +1 Persuasion

Leader.Name: Lady Jessica
Leader.LeaderAbility: Other Memories: When you send an Agent to a Bene Gesserit board space, you may return all your memories to your supply, drawing a card for each one. Then flip this Leader over.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Spice Agony: Trade 1 Spice for 1 Intrigue card and move a troop from your supply to the Bene Gesserit area of the board. It is now a memory.

Leader.Name: Shaddam Corrino IV
Leader.LeaderAbility: Sardaukar Commander: Set aside both Sardaukar contracts. Only you can acquire them during the game.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Emperor of the Known Universe: Units can't be deployed to the Conflict this turn. +1 Solari and +1 Troop OR trade 3 Solari for +1 Influence

Leader.Name: Princess Irulan
Leader.LeaderAbility: Imperial Birthright: When you reach 2 Influence with the Emperor: +1 Intrigue
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Chronicler's Insight: You may choose: Acquire a card that costs 1 Persuasion OR trash a card from your hand. If it has a cost of 1+ Persuasion: +2 Spice

Leader.Name: Lady Margot Fenring
Leader.LeaderAbility: Loyalty: When you reach 2 Influence with the the Bene Gesserit, +2 Spice.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Arrakis Informant: +1 Spy on any purple space.

Leader.Name: Feyd-Rautha Harkonnen
Leader.LeaderAbility: Devious Strength: Reveal Turn: Recall a Spy for 2 Strength.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Personal Training: Move your Feyd token one space to the right on your Training track, earning the reward on the new space.

Leader.Name: Lady Amber Metulli
Leader.LeaderAbility: Desert Scouts: Reveal Turn: You may retreat one of your troops.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Fill Coffers: +1 Solari and if you have an Alliance: +1 Spice

Leader.Name: Staban Tuek
Leader.StartingEffect: Limited Allies: You start the game without Diplomacy in your deck.
Leader.LeaderAbility: Smuggle Spice: Whenever another player sends an Agent to a Maker board space you are spying on: +1 Spice.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Unseen Network: +1 Spy. If placed on green, you may trade 1 Spice for 3 Solari. If placed on a Faction space, you may trade 2 Solari for 1 Intrigue card.

Leader.Name: Duncan Idaho
Leader.LeaderAbility: Ginaz Swordmaster: The Swordmaster boardspace costs you 2 Solari less.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Into the Fray: You may take an Agent you sent this turn and deploy it to the Conflict as a 2 strength unit that can't be retreated. If you have your Swordmaster, it has 3 strength instead.

Leader.Name: Chani
Leader.LeaderAbility: Tactician: Whenever you retreat or lose any number of troops from the Conflict, advance your Tactics token that many spaces, earning rewards as you reach them. Reset the token after reaching the end of the track.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Fedaykin Maneuver: Retreat any number of your troops OR If you have 2+ Influnece with the Fremen, trade 1 Water for 2 card Draws.

Leader.Name: Piter de Vries
Leader.StartingEffect: Twisted Genius: Shuffle the Twisted Intrigue deck and place it face down near you.
Leader.LeaderAbility: Twisted Genius: Round Start: Draw a Twisted Intrigue card. (These count as Intrigue cards and can be stolen)
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Harkonnen Advisor: +1 Troop. You can't deploy this troop to the Conflict this turn.

Leader.Name: Esmar Tuek
Leader.LeaderAbility: Tuek's Sietch: Whenever you send an Agent to Tuek's Sietch: +1 Solari. Whenever an opponent sends an Agent there: +1 Intrigue.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Smuggle Spice: Place 1 bonus spice on Tuek's Sietch OR Take 1 bonus spice from a Maker board space.

Leader.Name: Steersman Y'rkoon
Leader.StartingEffect:
Strange Form: You start the game with no Water and no Signet Ring in your deck. 

Plot Course: Shuffle the Navigation cards and draw a hand of five. Choose four to place face down above, in order. Return all others to the box. Whenever you reach 2 Influence with a Faction, play the next Navigation card above (starting from the left).
Leader.LeaderAbility: Hungry for Spice: Whenever you gain 3+ spice in a single turn, Draw 1 card.

Leader.Name: Count Hasimir Fenring
Leader.LeaderAbility: Assassin: Whenever you trash a card: +1 Solari.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Corrino Liason: You may trash a card in your play area OR Place 1 Spy with Deep Cover on the Emperor board area.

Leader.Name: Gaius Helen Mohiam
Leader.LeaderAbility: Clandestine: Each card you play has the Spy icon. Whenever you could recall a Spy to Gather Intelligence, you must.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Listeners: Place 1 Spy on a Green space OR Pay 1 Spice -> +1 Spy.

Leader.Name: Liet Kynes
Leader.LeaderAbility: Arrakis Planetologist: Ignore the Influence requirement of Sietch Tabr. You summon no sandworms. For each one you would, instead: Trash 1 card, +1 Spice, +1 Intrigue (even when the Conflict is protected by the Shield Wall).
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Judge of the Change: If you sent an Agent this turn to: Green board space AND 2+ Influence with the Emperor -> +1 Water; Purple board space -> +1 Solari; Yellow board space: +1 Spice.

Leader.Name: Kota Odax of Ix
Leader.StartingEffect: Secret Project: Peek at the bottom Tech tile of each stack. Place one face down here.
Leader.LeaderAbility: Secret Project: Whenever you could acquire a Tech tile, you may choose the one you set aside. It costs 1 Spice less.
Leader.SignetRingAbility: Reverse Engineering: +1 Spice OR Trash one of your Tech tiles -> +1 Intrigue and Draw 1 card.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 01
Navigation.Effect: +2 Solari. If this is in Navigation slot 4: For the rest of the game, during each of your Reveal turns, +1 Persuasion.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 02
Navigation.Effect: Trash a card. If you trash a card that costs 1+ Persuasion: +2 Spice.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 03
Navigation.Effect: +1 Water. If you played this as a result of reaching 2 Influence with the Spacing Guild: +1 Spice.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 04
Navigation.Effect: +1 Spice OR Pay 2 Solari -> Gain 1 Influence with a different Faction where you have 2+ Influence.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 05
Navigation.Effect: +1 Spice OR If this is in Navigation slot 1: Pay 1 Water -> Acquire The Spice Must Flow.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 06
Navigation.Effect: +1 Spice. If you have an Alliance: +1 Intrigue.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 07
Navigation.Effect: Lose 1 Influence with any faction -> Gain 1 influence with any faction.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 08
Navigation.Effect: Draw 1 card OR Spend 5 Spice -> +1 Victory Point.

Navigation.Name: Navigation Card 10
Navigation.Effect: +1 Spy OR Recall a spy -> +1 Intrigue and +2 Spice.

Sardaukar.Effect: If you have 3+ Influence with the Emperor: +2 Swords.

Sardaukar.Name: Fierce
Sardaukar.Effect: +1 Sword. If any opponent has a sandworm in the Conflict: +1 Sword.

Tech.Name: Gene-Locked Vault

Tech.Name: Glowglobes

Tech.Name: Planetary Array

Tech.Name: Servo-Receivers

Tech.Name: Delivery Bay

Tech.Name: Plasteel Blades

Tech.Name: Suspensor Suits

Tech.Name: Rapid Dropships

Tech.Name: Forbidden Weapons
Tech.AcquisitionBonus: Blow the Shield Wall and +1 Troop
Tech.Effect: Reveal turn: You must choose: +3 Swords and -1 Influence with any faction OR Lose all your spice and trash this.

Tech.Name: Advanced Data Analysis
Tech.Effect: To acquire this, you must trash one of your Spies from the board. Once per round: +1 Intrigue card.

Tech.Name: Ornithopter Fleet
Tech.Effect: All of your battle icons are now Ornithopters.

Tech.Name: Panopticon
Tech.Effect: Reveal turn: +1 Spy and +1 Troop. Endgame: Gain 1 Influence with each Faction where you have 1 or less Influence.

Tech.Name: Spy Drones
Tech.Effect: Once per round: +1 Solari AND If you recalled a Spy this turn: You may trash a card.

Tech.Name: CHOAM Transports
Tech.Effect: When you complete a contract: Draw a card. Endgame: Worth 1 Victory Point if you have completed for or more contracts.

board.Name: Sardaukar
board.Effect: Gain 1 Intrigue, Recruit 4 Troops.

board.Name: Dutiful Service
board.Effect: Gain 1 Contract (if CHOAM module in use; otherwise, gain 2 Solari).

board.Name: Heighliner
board.Effect: Recruit 5 Troops.

board.Name: Deliver Supplies
board.Effect: Gain 1 Water.

board.Name: Espionage
board.Effect: Draw 1 Card, Place 1 Spy on an unoccupied Observation Post.

board.Name: Secrets
board.Effect: Gain 1 Intrigue. May steal 1 Intrigue (random) from each opponent with 4+ Intrigue.

board.Name: Desert Tactics
board.Effect: Recruit 1 Troop, May trash 1 Card (hand/discard).

board.Name: Fremkit
board.Effect: Draw 1 Card.

board.Name: High Council
board.Effect: 1st Visit: Place Councilor token; gain 2 Persuasion ongoing. Subsequent: Gain 2 Spice, 1 Intrigue, Recruit 3 Troops.

board.Name: Imperial Privilege
board.Effect: Requirement: 2+ Influence with Emperor | May discard 1 Intrigue to draw 1 Intrigue, Recall 1 other Agent, Draw 1 Card.

board.Name: Swordmaster
board.Effect: Permanently gain 3rd Agent. (Cost 8 Solari for 1st player, 6 for others)

board.Name: Assembly Hall
board.Effect: Gain 1 Intrigue. During Reveal Turn, if Agent here, gain 1 Persuasion.

board.Name: Gather Support
board.Effect: Choose: Recruit 2 Troops OR Pay 2 Solari to recruit 2 Troops and gain 1 Water.

board.Name: CHOAM - Shipping
board.Effect: Requirement: 2+ Influence with Guild | Gain 5 Solari, +1 Influence with a Faction of choice.

board.Name: CHOAM - Accept Contract
board.Effect: Draw 1 Card, Gain 1 Contract (if CHOAM module in use; otherwise, gain 2 Solari).

board.Name: Deep Desert
board.Effect: Choose: Gain 4 Spice OR Summon 2 Sandworms. Collect bonus Spice.

board.Name: Hagga Basin
board.Effect: Choose: Gain 2 Spice OR Summon 1 Sandworm. Collect bonus Spice.

board.Name: Imperial Basin
board.Effect: Gain 1 Spice. Collect bonus Spice. Control: Controller gains 1 Spice when any player uses.

board.Name: Sietch Tabr
board.Effect: Requirement: 2+ Influence with Fremen | Choose: Gain 1 Maker Hook, Recruit 1 Troop, Gain 1 Water OR Destroy Shield Wall, Gain 1 Water.

board.Name: Research Station
board.Effect: Recruit 2 Troops, Draw 2 Cards.

board.Name: Spice Refinery
board.Effect: Choose: Gain 2 Solari OR Pay 1 Spice for 4 Solari. Control: Controller gains 1 Solari when any player uses.

board.Name: Arrakeen
board.Effect: Recruit 1 Troop, Draw 1 Card. Control: Controller gains 1 Solari when any player uses.
